productDisplayName: Peter England Unisex Black Laptop Bag
description: Style NoteCarrying your laptop has never made you look more stylish. With ample space for office accessories - this peter england bag is best suited for those who need to haul their laptops through the urban rush hour while keeping their belongings secure. Intricately woven, this bag brings style to your office everyday.Product DetailsBlack laptop bag with a purple padded innerOne main compartment for laptop along with organizer pouches, a fabric separator with mesh pockets on it and a padded separator with a Velcro closure (to hold your laptop)One compartment in the front with two pocketsOne zipped compartment at the backBlack synthetic haul loop and one adjustable shoulder strapSmall metal feet on baseMaterial and careSynthetic woven materialWipe with cloth to keep away dust and dirtWarranty: 6 monthsSizeLength: 40 cmWidth: 10 cmHeight: 34 cm
